# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    vmSize: 'Standard_DS3_v2'
    numberOfVMs: 2
    vmNamePrefix: dev
    location: eastus
    osDiskType: Premium_LRS
    publicIPAddressVersion: IPv4
    vmImage: 'Canonical@WindowsServer:1809-with-containers'

variables:
  publicIpNameFormat: pubip${index(split(resourceGroup().name, '-'))}dev${add(split(resourceGroup().name, '-')[2], variables('numberOfVMs'))}-$(uniqueString(parameters.vmNamePrefix))
  nicNameFormat: myNic-$(variables.publicIpNameFormat)
  networkInterfaceId: []
  virtualNetworkName: devVnet
  subnetName: devSubnet
  publicIPAddressName: []

functions:
  uniqueString:
    type: azurerm.properties.Functions.uniqueString
      properties: {}

variables:
  subnetRef: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{virtualNetworkName}'
  networkSecurityGroupRef: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/default'

  networkInterfaceCreationData: {
    name: '[parameters("nicNameFormat")]',
    location: '[parameters("location")]',
    properties: {
      ipConfigurations: [
        {
          name: 'ipconfig1',
          properties: {
            privateIPAddressAllocationMethod: 'Dynamic'
          }
        }
      ],
      dnsSettings: {
        dnsServers: ['10.0.0.4']
      },
      networkSecurityGroup: {
        id: '[variables("networkSecurityGroupRef")]'
      },
      subnet: {
        id: '[concat(variables("subnetRef"), "/subnets/", parameters("subnetName"))]'
      }
    }
  }

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2019-10-01
    name: '[variables("virtualNetworkName")]'
    properties:
      location: '[parameters("location")]'
      addressSpace: {
        addressPrefixes: ['10.0.0.0/16']
      }
      subnets: [
        {
          name: '[parameters("subnetName")]',
          properties: {}
        }
      ]

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    dependsOn:
    - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/'[variables("virtualNetworkName")]'
    name: '[variables("nicNameFormat")]'
    properties: '[variables("networkInterfaceCreationData")]'
    copy:
      count: '[parameters("numberOfVMs")]'

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2018-10-01
    name: '[concat(parameters("vmNamePrefix"), copyindex())]'
    properties:
      location: '[parameters("location")]'
      size: '[parameters("vmSize")]'
      osProfile:
        windowsConfiguration:
          provisionVMAgent: true
          enableAutomaticUpgrades: true
      hardWareProfile: {}
      networkProfile:
        id: '[reference(resourceId('concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/', variables("nicNameFormat"))))].id'
      storageProfile:
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: '[parameters("osDiskType")]'
            caching: ReadWrite
        imageReference:
          publisher: '[parameters("vmImage")]'
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 1809-with-containers
          version: latest
      plan:
        name: windowsserver-container
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        product: WindowsServer
        version: '1809- containers'
        resourceGroup: '[resourceGroup().name]'
      type: Virtual Machines
    copy:
      count: '[parameters("numberOfVMs")]'

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    name: '[variables("publicIPAddressName")+[add(copyindex(), 1)]]'
    properties: {}
    copy:
      count: '[parameters("numberOfVMs")]'

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/ipConfigurations/properties/privateLinkSettings
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    name: 'ipconfig1/privateLinkSettings/' + copyindex()
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/'[concat(parameters("vmNamePrefix"), copyindex())]'
    properties: {
      name: 'testPLS'
      groupIds: []
    }
    copy:
      count: '[parameters("numberOfVMs")]'

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses/ipConfigurations
    apiVersion: 2019-08-01
    name: 'ipconfig1/ipConfigurations/' + copyindex()
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/'[concat(parameters("vmNamePrefix"), copyindex())]'
    properties: {
      privateIPAllocationMethod: Static
      subnet: {
        id: '[variables("subnetRef")]/subnets/$(parameters("subnetName"))'
      }
      loadBalancerBackendAddressPools: []
      publicIPAddress: {
        id: '[resourceId('concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/resourceGroups/', resourceGroup().name, '/publicIPAddresses/', variables("publicIPAddressName")+[add(copyindex(), 1)]))]'
      }
    }
    copy:
      count: '[parameters("numberOfVMs")]'
